---
title: "Figure 4 — Distortion components vs acquisition interval"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
PUBLICATION figure 4, based on figure_3_paper.Rmd's p2 (distortion components vs
interval_in_tau). Six distortion matrices, diagonal, bootstrapped (operation=probit),
on log-log axes with the null at 1:

  from *_battery_pool.csv  (at theta_pool):
    Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion   temporal-correlation blindness (short Δ/τ)
    Likelihood_Sample_Distortion        Gaussian-vs-Poisson geometric tension (intermediate)
    Likelihood_Information_Distortion    total (= the IDM)
    Likelihood_Gaussian_Fisher_Distortion  analytic-vs-numerical Fisher mismatch
  from *_empirical.csv (group_size = 10):
    Empirical_Covariance_Fisher_Distortion     empirical cloud vs naive Fisher (CI inflation)
    Empirical_Covariance_Corrected_Distortion  empirical cloud vs sandwich (≈1 if the fix works)

SCALE: main figure = R/MR/IR (share the scale per component row, so they are
directly comparable — the subtle-but-robust comparison). NR/NMR -> SUPPLEMENT
(own scale), since their distortion is orders of magnitude larger and would crush
R/MR/IR. Diagonal collapsed to the geometric mean over the kinetic params (on,off);
per-parameter detail is a supplement.

Luciano's filters are reproduced verbatim: Num_ch>10, param_col==param_index,
group_size==10 for the empirical pair, quantile_0.975<1000 & quantile_0.025>0.001.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000          # use the 10000-replica runs, NOT the nsim_1000 ones
NOISE    <- "0.1"
NCH      <- c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)
ALGOS    <- c("macro_NR","macro_NMR","macro_R","macro_MR","macro_IR")
ALGO_LAB <- c(macro_NR="NR", macro_NMR="NMR", macro_R="R", macro_MR="MR", macro_IR="IR")
MAIN_ALGOS <- c("R","MR","IR")          # share scale, directly comparable
SUPP_ALGOS <- c("NR","NMR")             # own scale (supplement)

COMP_POOL <- c("Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion",
               "Likelihood_Sample_Distortion",
               "Likelihood_Information_Distortion",
               "Likelihood_Gaussian_Fisher_Distortion")
COMP_EMP  <- c("Empirical_Covariance_Fisher_Distortion",
               "Empirical_Covariance_Corrected_Distortion")
COMP_LAB  <- c(Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion = "correlation",
               Likelihood_Sample_Distortion = "sample",
               Likelihood_Information_Distortion = "information (total)",
               Likelihood_Gaussian_Fisher_Distortion = "Gaussian-vs-num Fisher",
               Empirical_Covariance_Fisher_Distortion = "emp.cov vs Fisher",
               Empirical_Covariance_Corrected_Distortion = "emp.cov vs corrected")
KIN_IDX  <- 0:1            # collapse diagonal over on, off (geometric mean)
```

```{r read}
read_skip1 <- function(path) read.csv(path, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
grid <- expand.grid(nch = NCH, algo = ALGOS, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
base <- file.path(DATA_DIR, sprintf("figure_3_nch_%d_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s",
                                    grid$nch, NSIM, grid$algo, NOISE))
base <- base[file.exists(paste0(base, "_battery_pool.csv"))]

# Likelihood_* distortions at theta_pool (battery_pool) + empirical distortions
d <- bind_rows(
  map_dfr(paste0(base, "_battery_pool.csv"), read_skip1),
  map_dfr(paste0(base, "_empirical.csv"),    read_skip1)
) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  mutate(component = str_replace(component_path, "^Probit_statistics_", ""),
         algo = factor(ALGO_LAB[algorithm], levels = unname(ALGO_LAB)))

d_mean <- d %>%
  filter(!component %in% c("Probit_statistics")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(probit, quantile_level), values_from = value)
```

```{r distortion}
# diagonal, bootstrapped, stable cells only; collapse to geometric mean over on/off
dist <- d_mean %>%
  filter(component %in% c(COMP_POOL, COMP_EMP),
         statistic == "value", operation == "probit",
         Num_ch > 10,
         param_index == param_col, param_index %in% KIN_IDX,
         (!component %in% COMP_EMP) | group_size == 10,
         quantile_0.975 < 1000, quantile_0.025 > 0.001) %>%
  group_by(algo, component, Num_ch, interval_in_tau) %>%
  summarise(med   = exp(mean(log(quantile_0.5))),
            lo16  = exp(mean(log(quantile_0.16))),  hi84  = exp(mean(log(quantile_0.84))),
            lo025 = exp(mean(log(quantile_0.025))), hi975 = exp(mean(log(quantile_0.975))),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(component = factor(COMP_LAB[as.character(component)], levels = unname(COMP_LAB)))
```

```{r plot-builder}
plot_dist <- function(df, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(interval_in_tau, med, colour = factor(Num_ch), group = Num_ch)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, colour = "#009E73", linewidth = .4) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo025, ymax = hi975), alpha = .3) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo16, ymax = hi84), linewidth = .9, alpha = .6) +
    geom_line() + geom_point(size = .8) +
    facet_grid(component ~ algo, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
    scale_colour_viridis_d(name = "N_ch", end = .9) +
    labs(x = expression(Delta/tau[min]), y = "distortion (diag, geomean on/off; null 1)",
         title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom")
}
```

```{r fig4-main, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 12}
g4 <- plot_dist(dist %>% filter(algo %in% MAIN_ALGOS),
                "Figure 4  Distortion components vs Δ/τ — R, MR, IR (shared scale per component)")
g4
ggsave("Figure_4.pdf", g4, width = 9, height = 12)
```

```{r fig4-supp, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 12}
g4s <- plot_dist(dist %>% filter(algo %in% SUPP_ALGOS),
                 "Figure 4—supplement  Non-recursive NR, NMR (own scale)")
g4s
ggsave("Figure_4_supp_NR_NMR.pdf", g4s, width = 7, height = 12)
```
